---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken — report it so it stays fixed
labels: bug
---

## Problem

<!-- What happens, and what did you expect instead? One or two sentences. -->

## Environment

<!-- Paste the output of:
       docker exec <controller-container> cat /clusterio/BUILD_INFO
     plus the image tag(s) you pulled. This pins the exact build. -->

```json
```

## Evidence

<!-- The receipts: exact commands run, exact output/log lines (docker logs, or
     /clusterio/logs/*.log — see README "Viewing Logs"), file:line references.
     Claims without evidence get asked for evidence. -->

## What you already ruled out

<!-- Optional but gold: what you tested and eliminated, with the commands.
     See issue #24 for the model — it saves everyone re-treading. -->

## Impact

<!-- Who hits this and what it costs (broken boot? silent data loss? confusing docs?). -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- What, concretely and testably, would make this closed? Checkboxes. -->

- [ ]
